top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, c.gender
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
JOIN loan l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F';

SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, c.gender
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
JOIN loan l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F';

SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, c.gender
FROM client c
INNER JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
INNER JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id AND ca.type = 'credit'
INNER JOIN loan l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F';

SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, c.gender
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
JOIN loan l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F';

SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, c.gender
FROM client c
INNER JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
INNER JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id AND ca.type = 'credit'
INNER JOIN loan l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F';

SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, c.gender
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
JOIN loan l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND ca.type = 'credit';

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, c.gender
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
JOIN loan l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F';
